title: Alien Anthology
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:AlienAnthology.jpg]] |title=''Alien Anthology'' |author=*[[Steve Miller]] *[[Owen K.C. Stephens|Owen Stephens]] |cover artist= |illustrator=*[[John Gallagher]] *[[Adi Granov]] *[[Mikael Noguchi]] *[[Sam Wood]] |editor=*[[Brian Campbell]] *[[Cory J. Herndon]] |publisher=[[Wizards of the Coast]] |release date=October [[2001]]{{Wizards|url=starwars/product.asp?wtc12663|text=Alien Anthology: A Star Wars Accessory}} |type=Paperback |pages=128 |dimensions=10.7 × 8.4 × 0.3 inches |weight=12.3 ounces |isbn=0-7869-2663-5 |isbn2= |isbn3= |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Alien Anthology''''' is a paperback supplement to the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''. It was written by [[Steve Miller]] and [[Owen K.C. Stephens|Owen Stephens]] and published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] in October [[2001]]. A web enhancement named "Even More Aliens!", detailing three more species, was released on Wizards of the Coast's website. A revised and expanded hardcover volume called the ''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' was released in [[2003]]. ==Contents== *Introduction ===Creature Source Section=== ====Creatures of the Galaxy====
